queries.question: Empirical analysis of the correlation between loan duration in months and credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk drivers and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with savings account balances below 100 DM and increased credit risk exposure.
